items.name: PJ’s Toxic Chain
items.description: Radiating danger and dripping with attitude, this chain isn’t just an accessory—it’s a warning. Forged from virtual biohazard steel and pulsing with neon green venom, the Toxic Chain wraps around your avatar like a radioactive relic from a forgotten lab. Whether you're flexing in a post-apocalyptic hangout or just want to look like you bite back, this chain screams: “Handle with caution.”
